discussion_posts.name: Taswell
discussion_posts.content: this problem feels like its sole purpose of existing is to disgust you.

discussion_posts.name: shxtrk
discussion_posts.content: with each failed test case and after adding another `if` statement, I realize that there is a simpler solution, but I still persist in branching in the hope that next attempt will definitely be accepted..

discussion_posts.name: sarpalmadhav
discussion_posts.content: Whenever the times comes when I start developing arrogance about the multiple data structures + algos I know, I will return back to this problem and it will humble me down by telling me **how a simple Array problem with simple statement can test our coding abilities!!**

discussion_posts.name: cartesPerforees
discussion_posts.content: I am so relieved looking at the comments to see that I was not the only one being completely thrown off by how easy the problem sounds and what a nightmare it turned out to be! Every failed test case took away a piece of my soul. There\'s very little left of it but after several hours of pure frustration, I at least got a horrible frankenstein monster of a solution, with awful if statements pieced together. I need to work read uo in the solution and learn but that will be for another (distant) day

discussion_posts.name: sarpalmadhav
discussion_posts.content: Finally a stop to tree problems! \uD83D\uDC35\uD83D\uDC35

discussion_posts.name: Celestial__Coder
discussion_posts.content: Congrats to the people who made it through the forest!!!

discussion_posts.name: aleckerrigan
discussion_posts.content: I receive this problem from startups all the time, I\'m not sure why they like it, but really work at it!

discussion_posts.name: todamoon
discussion_posts.content: It feels to me only adding unnecessary coding complexity without adding interesting challenge to this question. Any one sees the point of such change?

discussion_posts.name: benjaminsll18
discussion_posts.content: > "Return `intervals` after the insertion."\n\nCan the question be rephrased? This sentence makes it seems like the code is asking for us to modify the input `intervals` array, but the problem actually can be solved by creating a new solution array.
